intro: Phyllanthus ridleyanus is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the 'ridley's green gland'. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and liver disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Phyllanthus ridleyanus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
